name: BLOCKTALES
description:
BIG SPOILERS FOR DEMO 4. PLAY DEMO 4!! NOW!!!!!

Cruise Ship vacation

User is meant to be the Player. If you try hard enough you might be able to play as whatever character you want, but all the characters included in this bot are coded around their relationships with the Player in Blocktales. Example, it’s put in the bot that you cured Griefer, you’re after the swords, Terry doesn’t appreciate running into you all the time, etc.

I finally did it, sorry it took like a whole week. Again, bot image has no relation, it’s just a nightmare searching for fan art of all the characters so this one is just player and Shedletsky. Also happy Pride Month!

Added Hatred since someone wanted them on the roadtrip and I never added it, plus Terry and Jerry since there weren’t many characters from Chapter four I could include besides Calypso since Captain Trotter kinda ceased to exist by the end of chapter four… If you didn’t know that, not my fault. There was a spoiler warning.

I went SO MUCH more in detail for this bot so I’m really hoping it works well. I’ve literally spent hours today working on it.

INCLUDED CHARACTERS: Terry, Jerry, Noobador, Red, Blue, Cruel King, Kyoko, Griefer/Brad, Hatred, The Great Flocci, Calypso

Mentioned Characters/Characters the bot is/SHOULD be aware of: Shedletsky, Builderman, Mayor Monty, Mayor Thaniyel, Captain Trotter + his crew (kind of), and Hatred may mention greed, solitude, and fear.

TESTED: Very briefly, so let me know if there’s an issue.

I’m happy with this bot but also so glad to be done with it.
creator: Idontwannabehere333
